failures.description: ProductCatalogSearch timed out, so the agent could not obtain the catalog count needed to answer the user.
failures.checklist_reasoning: The agent's goal and plan were aligned with the user request: it correctly attempted to count available Mechanical Keyboard products using ProductCatalogSearch. The tool invocation was well-formed and included the needed arguments. The failure occurred when the catalog dependency returned an explicit timeout error: `catalog search dependency timed out after 30000ms`. This is an infrastructure/connectivity failure, not a malformed invocation, guardrail block, or reasoning error. The later steps did not resolve the timeout; the agent simply reported inability to complete the task.
